title: Minister of Post and Telecommunications  |  Chair, Digital Government Committee  |  Digital Economy and Society Policy 2021–2035 Architect

leader.name: Chea Vandeth
leader.purpose: Mental model schema mapping decision-making architecture across 7 dimensions Minister of Post and Telecommunications since April 2020. Rebuilt the ministry from a low-visibility infrastructure unit into Cambodia's digital transformation lead. Launched Cambodia Digital Economy and Society Policy Framework 2021-2035; Cambodia Digital Government Policy 2022-2035. VERIFY.GOV.KH won ASEAN Digital Awards gold medal 2024. First government official to discuss Starlink integration (February 2025). Revenue collection 2020-2024 was $804M — more than triple the 2015-2019 period of $216M.

growth_theory.assessed_position: Vandeth's growth theory is technological leapfrog: a country at Cambodia's income level can bypass traditional development stages by building digital infrastructure that enables all sectors to operate more efficiently simultaneously. His three-pillar framework — digital government, digital citizens, digital businesses — is internally consistent and operationally specific. The DWF (Document Work Fl
growth_theory.primary_quote: For a developing country like Cambodia, new technologies provide an opportunity to leapfrog, bypassing traditional phases of development. We want to transform our government to be digital and reduce as much as possible the use of paper.
subfields: Core Thesis: Digital infrastructure as economic leapfrog platform

risk_tolerance.assessed_position: Vandeth pioneered blockchain-registered documents (VERIFY.GOV.KH), advocated digital labs in primary schools in provinces where digital literacy is near-zero, and initiated Starlink discussions for connectivity coverage. These are non-trivial implementation risks in a bureaucratically resistant environment. His acknowledgement that cybercrime and data privacy risks are growing — and his call for l
subfields: Assessment: MEDIUM-HIGH — Willing to build new systems; avoids political risks

time_horizon.assessed_position: The Cambodia Digital Economy and Society Policy Framework runs to 2035 — a 14-year planning horizon that is the longest of any operational policy document in this cohort except Sok Siphana's trade framework. 5G rollout scheduled to begin 2026. The 42 digital labs programme targets grade 4–9 students — a 10-year human capital investment. Vandeth has the longest and most institutionally-anchored tim

dependency_assumptions.assessed_position: 1. Connectivity infrastructure reaches rural and peri-urban Cambodia at scale: urban digital adoption is real; rural connectivity is the gap. The Starlink discussion is a recognition of this problem. 2. institution_vs_relationship.assessed_position: Within his ministry, Vandeth has built genuine institutional infrastructure: four national digital policy strategies approved by Royal Government, the DWF system, VERIFY.GOV.KH, the Telecoms Cambodia reform programme, the Digital Government Committee. subfields: Verdict: Strongly institutional within MPTC; relationship-embedded in broader system

global_positioning_logic.assessed_position: Vandeth's global positioning logic is technical-diplomacy led: winning ASEAN Digital Awards, engaging AmCham's ICT committee, co-ordinating with UNESCO on digital literacy, co-ordinating with Singapore's MAS on fintech — these are all positioning moves that build Cambodia's reputation in the digital governance space independent of political controversies. subfields: Theory: Cambodia as regional digital hub through infrastructure leadership
Overall: HIGH on government digitisation; MEDIUM on citizen digital inclusion; LOW on regulatory framework for risks he has himself identified. The infrastructure is ahead of the governance.
